trainingDay.easedSubtitle: Eased back a touch today — $t({{driversKey}}). Showing up on a day like this counts double.
trainingDay.readySubtitle: Warm up well. Your starting numbers are below — they'll be waiting in the session.
trainingDay.heading: Today
trainingDay.lowStreak_one: {{count}} low day in a row now — making this a rest day is a completely fine choice. Your session will wait for you.
trainingDay.lowStreak_other: {{count}} low days in a row now — making this a rest day is a completely fine choice. Your session will wait for you.

noProgram: No training program is set up yet. Your next phase will appear here.

plannedDay.upcomingSubtitle: Your first session is ready — begin on day one, or jump in early if you can't wait.
plannedDay.restSubtitleEased: A genuine rest day, perfectly timed. Recharge — your next session will wait.
plannedDay.restSubtitleReady: Swim, play, walk — or do nothing at all. Your next session is ready when you are.
plannedDay.endedTitle: That's a wrap on this phase
plannedDay.endedSubtitle: Your next program will appear here once it begins.

inProgress.loggedSets_one: {{count}} set logged so far. Pick up right where you left off.
inProgress.loggedSets_other: {{count}} sets logged so far. Pick up right where you left off.
inProgress.waiting: Your session is open and waiting.
inProgress.discardArmed: Tap again to discard this session

doneToday.title: Done for today
doneToday.subtitle: {{setsPhrase}}{{minutesPhrase}} · {{volume}} kg moved. Rest well — that's part of the plan.

weeklyReview.heading: Last week
weeklyReview.noSessionsScheduled: No sessions were scheduled last week.
weeklyReview.quietWeek: A quiet week — no sessions logged.
